name: fasm2-studio
description: VS Code tooling for flat assembler (fasm2/fasmg and fasm1)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace debug && npm run build --workspace extension
scripts.watch: npm run watch --workspace server & npm run watch --workspace debug & npm run watch --workspace extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace debug && npm run typecheck --workspace extension
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace server && npm run test --workspace debug && npm run test --workspace extension
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package --workspace extension
